\tzpentry{ID3604}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3604 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} a_{lm}(\mu_r) = \frac{(l+1)(\mu_r - 1)}{(l+1)\mu_r + l} R^{2l+1} \end{equation}
